agent.fields.gateway_timeout.help: Seconds a gateway request may run before being cancelled. 0 uses the gateway default.
agent.fields.gateway_timeout.label: Gateway timeout (seconds)
agent.fields.max_turns.help: Maximum model turns per user request before the engine bails out.
agent.fields.max_turns.label: Max turns
agent.label: Agent
agent.summary: Engine turn limit and gateway request budget.
auxiliary.fields.api_key.label: API key
auxiliary.fields.base_url.label: Base URL
auxiliary.fields.model.help: Provider-qualified id; optional — falls back to the main provider's default.
auxiliary.fields.model.label: Model
auxiliary.fields.provider.help: Provider factory. Leave blank to reuse the main provider.
auxiliary.fields.provider.label: Provider
auxiliary.label: Auxiliary provider
auxiliary.summary: Secondary provider for compression, vision, and background tasks. Leave all fields blank to reuse the main provider.
browser.fields.browserbase.api_key.help: Env var BROWSERBASE_API_KEY overrides this value at runtime.

browser.fields.browserbase.project_id.he: Env var BROWSERBASE_PROJECT_ID overrides this value at runtime.

cron.fields.model.help: Leave blank to use the default model.

cron.fields.name.label: Name
cron.fields.prompt.help: Prompt text to send. For long prompts, edit YAML directly.

cron.fields.schedule.label: Schedule

fallback_providers.fields.provider.label: Provider type
fallback_providers.label: Fallback Providers
fallback_providers.summary: Ordered list of providers tried in turn when the primary fails.

mcp.summary: Model Context Protocol servers launched on CLI/gateway startup.

skills.summary: Enable or disable installed skills. The list reflects what's in <instance>/skills/.
storage.fields.driver.label: Driver
storage.fields.postgres_url.label: Postgres URL

storage.fields.sqlite_path.label: SQLite path

storage.summary: Where hermind keeps conversation history and agent state.
terminal.fields.backend.help: Which execution backend to run shell commands through.
terminal.fields.backend.label: Backend
terminal.fields.cwd.help: Absolute path used as cwd for each command. Empty = backend default.
terminal.fields.cwd.label: Working directory
terminal.fields.daytona_base_url.label: Daytona base URL
terminal.fields.daytona_token.label: Daytona token
terminal.fields.docker_image.label: Docker image

terminal.fields.modal_token.label: Modal token
terminal.fields.singularity_image.label: Singularity image

terminal.fields.ssh_host.label: SSH host
terminal.fields.ssh_key.help: Filesystem path to the private key file.
terminal.fields.ssh_key.label: SSH key path
terminal.fields.ssh_user.label: SSH user
terminal.fields.timeout.help: Command timeout; 0 means use the backend default.
terminal.fields.timeout.label: Default timeout (seconds)
terminal.label: Terminal
terminal.summary: Shell-exec backend used by the agent's bash tool.
tracing.fields.enabled.label: Enabled
tracing.fields.file.help: Path to the JSON-lines trace file. Leave blank for stderr.
tracing.fields.file.label: File
tracing.label: Tracing
tracing.summary: Stdlib-based tracing emitted to a JSON-lines sink.
benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.summary: Defaults for `hermind bench` (skills) and `hermind bench replay` (memory replay).
benchmark.fields.dataset_size.label: Dataset size
benchmark.fields.dataset_size.help: Number of synthetic items per benchmark run. Default 50.
benchmark.fields.seed.label: Random seed
benchmark.fields.seed.help: Deterministic seed for dataset generation. Default 42.
benchmark.fields.judge_model.label: Judge model (default)
benchmark.fields.judge_model.help: Default judge model. Empty falls back to the auxiliary model, then the primary model. Used by every bench subtree unless overridden.
benchmark.fields.out_dir.label: Output directory
benchmark.fields.out_dir.help: Where bench artifacts are written. Default .hermind/benchmark.
benchmark.fields.replay.default_mode.hel: Replay invocation mode. cold = run-without-history; contextual = run-with-history.
benchmark.fields.replay.default_history_: Max prior turns injected into a contextual replay. 0 means "use the built-in default of 20 when mode is contextual".
benchmark.fields.replay.default_judge.he: Judge mode for replay outputs. none = skip judging; pairwise = compare current vs baseline; rubric+pairwise = pairwise plus a rubric score pass.
benchmark.fields.replay.out_dir.label: Replay output directory
benchmark.fields.replay.out_dir.help: Where replay datasets and run records land. Default .hermind/replay.
benchmark.fields.replay.judge_model.help: Override judge model for replay only. Empty falls back to the parent benchmark.judge_model.
presence.label: User presence
presence.summary: Three-state presence framework that gates background workers (idle consolidator, future schedulers).
presence.fields.http_idle_absent_after_s: Time without inbound HTTP requests before the user is voted Absent. Default 300 (5 min). 0 disables the signal.
presence.fields.sleep_window.enabled.hel: When on, votes Absent during the configured local-clock hours. Never votes Present (insomnia/night-shift case).
presence.fields.sleep_window.start.label: Sleep window start (HH:MM)
presence.fields.sleep_window.start.help: Local-clock start time, 24-hour format. Cross-midnight windows are supported (e.g., 22:00 → 06:00).
presence.fields.sleep_window.end.label: Sleep window end (HH:MM)
presence.fields.sleep_window.timezone.he: IANA timezone name, e.g. America/Los_Angeles. Empty = process local timezone.
proxy.label: Anthropic /v1/messages proxy
proxy.summary: Expose an Anthropic-compatible Messages API endpoint at /v1/messages. Off by default.
proxy.fields.enabled.label: Enable proxy
proxy.fields.enabled.help: Mount the /v1/messages route at the API server root. Restart hermind after toggling.
proxy.fields.keep_alive_seconds.label: SSE keep-alive interval (seconds)
proxy.fields.keep_alive_seconds.help: Heartbeat ping interval on the streaming response. Default 15. Values <= 0 are clamped to 15.
web.label: Web tools
web.summary: Web search provider configuration. DuckDuckGo is the keyless fallback and always available.
web.fields.search.provider.label: Search provider
web.fields.search.provider.help: Leave blank to auto-select by priority (Tavily > Brave > Exa > DuckDuckGo).
web.fields.search.providers.tavily.api_k: Env var TAVILY_API_KEY overrides this value at runtime.
web.fields.search.providers.brave.api_ke: Env var BRAVE_API_KEY overrides this value at runtime.
Env var EXA_API_KEY overrides this value at runtime.
skills.fields.auto_extract.label: Auto-extract skills
skills.fields.auto_extract.help: After each conversation, ask the LLM to extract reusable skill snippets and save them to the instance's skills/ directory. Default off.
skills.fields.inject_count.label: Skills injected per turn
skills.fields.inject_count.help: Maximum dynamically retrieved skills injected into the system prompt each turn. 0 disables retrieval. Default 3.
skills.fields.generation_half_life.label: Generation half-life
skills.fields.generation_half_life.help: Memory reinforcement signals decay by half every N skill generations. Default 5. Set to 0 to disable decay (signals always weighted as 1.0).
agent.fields.default_system_prompt.label: Default system prompt
agent.fields.default_system_prompt.help: System prompt used when no session-specific prompt is set.
web.fields.search.providers.duckduckgo.u: Optional username for authenticated DuckDuckGo access.
web.fields.search.providers.duckduckgo.p: Optional password for authenticated DuckDuckGo access.
